raw: {"perspective": "Security Auditor", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/assessment.py", "issue": "Missing rate limiting on /assessment/start endpoint. Allows brute-force profile creation and resource exhaustion.", "recommended_fix": "Implement rate limiter using FastAPI middleware (e.g., slowapi) with limits per IP or user."}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/hooks/use-energy-mode.ts", "issue": "Energy level stored in Supabase without RLS policy enforcement. Potential data leakage if policies misconfigured.", "recommended_fix": "Verify RLS policy 'enable_rls_on_user_settings' exists and enforces row-level security for user-owned records."}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/schemas/assessment.py", "issue": "automated_decision_consent field is required but not validated for non-nullable in database. Risk of incomplete GDPR Art. 22 compliance.", "recommended_fix": "Ensure Supabase column has NOT NULL constraint and default value set to false."}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["apps/api/app/main.py", "supabase/init.sql"]}

findings.issue: Missing rate limiting on /assessment/start endpoint. Allows brute-force profile creation and resource exhaustion.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement rate limiter using FastAPI middleware (e.g., slowapi) with limits per IP or user.

findings.issue: Energy level stored in Supabase without RLS policy enforcement. Potential data leakage if policies misconfigured.
findings.recommended_fix: Verify RLS policy 'enable_rls_on_user_settings' exists and enforces row-level security for user-owned records.

findings.issue: automated_decision_consent field is required but not validated for non-nullable in database. Risk of incomplete GDPR Art. 22 compliance.
findings.recommended_fix: Ensure Supabase column has NOT NULL constraint and default value set to false.
